title: blackman
summary: Generate a Blackman window as an N-by-1 real column vector.
description: `blackman(N)` returns an `N x 1` real column vector containing the symmetric Blackman window coefficients commonly used when lower spectral leakage is desired.
behaviors: `blackman(N)` expects a nonnegative scalar integer length.
For `N > 1`, coefficients follow the symmetric Blackman formula `0.42 - 0.5*cos(2*pi*n/(N-1)) + 0.08*cos(4*pi*n/(N-1))`.
This currently documents the common one-argument symmetric form.
